page_metadata.biotools__summary: COGRIM is an R program of Bayesian hierarchical model and Gibbs Sampling implementation that integrates gene expression, ChIP binding, and transcription factor motif data in a principled and robust fashion.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: COGRIM is an R program of Bayesian hierarchical model and Gibbs Sampling implementation that integrates gene expression, ChIP binding, and transcription factor motif data in a principled and robust fashion.
